ai_helpers.messages.ne-udalos-poluchit-a: Failed to get AI analysis, please try again later.

You have already analyzed this wallet.
Try searching for it with /search_analysis or enter another wallet.

common_handler.messages.pozhalujsta-zave: ⚠️ Please finish the current dialog or use /stop to cancel.

get_ai_analyze.messages.hugging-face-tok: Error: Hugging Face token not found.
get_ai_analyze.messages.limit-hugging-fa: Hugging Face API limit exceeded. Please try again later.
help.messages.b-spravka-b-ya: 🆘 Help 🆘 I can analyze Solana wallet strategies with AI! Commands: /start — Launch the bot 🚀 /stop — If something went wrong 🛑 /help — This message ℹ️ /analyze — Analyze a Solana wallet 🔍 /search_analysis — Search analysis by wallet or nickname 🔎 /history — My analysis history 📜 /clear_history — Clear analysis history 🗑
search_analysis.messages.prishli-adres-k: Send a wallet address or nickname to search.
search_helpers.messages.ne-udalos-najti-: Could not find such a wallet or nickname.
start.messages.privet-ya-bot: Hi 👋 I’m a bot for analyzing Solana smart wallets. Press the button below to get started and see the help menu.
stop.messages.dejstvie-otmeneno-mozhesh-: Action canceled. You can choose a new command or press /help.
stop.messages.sejchas-net-aktivnogo-dejs: There is no active action to cancel right now.
unknown_command.messages.neizvestnaya-ko: ❓ Unknown command. Use /help to see the list of available commands.
